name: mcp-powerbi-finvision
description: MCP server for Power BI Desktop analysis, DAX debugging, and model operations
long_description: MCP-PowerBi-Finvision enables AI-powered analysis of Power BI models with consolidated tools for connection, model operations, DAX intelligence, analysis, and debugging.

tools.name: 02_Model_Operations
tools.description: [02] Unified CRUD for tables, columns, measures, relationships, calc groups

tools.name: 02_TMDL_Operations
tools.description: [02] TMDL export, find/replace, bulk rename, migration

tools.name: 04_Run_DAX
tools.description: [04] Execute DAX query with trace analysis

tools.name: 04_Query_Operations
tools.description: [04] Data sources, M expressions, search, roles, RLS testing

tools.name: 07_Report_Operations
tools.description: [07] Report info, measure usage, rename, rebind, backup

tools.name: 07_PBIP_Operations
tools.description: [07] Offline PBIP analysis, validation, dependencies, aggregation

tools.name: 07_Visual_Operations
tools.description: [07] Visual CRUD, formatting, data binding, sync, interactions

tools.name: 09_Debug_Operations
tools.description: [09] Visual debug, SE/FE trace, compare, drill, audit, config

tools.name: 09_Validate
tools.description: [09] Cross-visual validation, expected values, filter permutations
